name: conductor-oss-workspace
author: Conductor Contributors
description: Markdown-native AI agent orchestrator — dispatch coding tasks from a kanban board

scripts.dev:backend: sh -c 'WORKSPACE=${CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE:-$PWD}; CONFIG=${CO_CONFIG_PATH:-$WORKSPACE/conductor.yaml}; CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE CO_CONFIG_PATH=$CONFIG cargo run -p conductor-cli -- --workspace "$WORKSPACE" start --port ${CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT:-4749}'
scripts.dev:full: sh -c 'WORKSPACE=${CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE:-$PWD}; CONFIG=${CO_CONFIG_PATH:-$WORKSPACE/conductor.yaml}; PORT=${PORT:-3000}; CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT=${CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT:-4749}; CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE CO_CONFIG_PATH=$CONFIG cargo run -p conductor-cli -- --workspace "$WORKSPACE" start --port $CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT & CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE CO_CONFIG_PATH=$CONFIG CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:$CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT bun run --cwd packages/web dev -- --port $PORT'
scripts.prod:prepare: bun run --cwd packages/web build && cargo build -p conductor-cli --release
scripts.prod:full: sh -c 'WORKSPACE=${CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE:-$PWD}; CONFIG=${CO_CONFIG_PATH:-$WORKSPACE/conductor.yaml}; DASHBOARD_PORT=${PORT:-4747}; BACKEND_PORT=${CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT:-4748}; BACKEND_BIN=${CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_BIN:-target/release/conductor}; if [ ! -x "$BACKEND_BIN" ]; then echo "Missing Rust backend binary at $BACKEND_BIN. Run bun run prod:prepare first." >&2; exit 1; fi; CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE CO_CONFIG_PATH=$CONFIG "$BACKEND_BIN" --workspace "$WORKSPACE" --config "$CONFIG" start --host 127.0.0.1 --port $BACKEND_PORT & CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE=$WORKSPACE CO_CONFIG_PATH=$CONFIG CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:$BACKEND_PORT bun run --cwd packages/web start -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port $DASHBOARD_PORT'
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/web clean && cargo clean
